# antonlebed.com — The Primordial Rose
# Mathematical framework: physical constants from the ring Z/970200Z
# 154 interactive pages. CC0 public domain. All code runs in browser.
# Author: Anton Alexandrovich Lebed
# Source: https://github.com/antonlebed/antonlebed.com

## What this is
A single algebraic structure — the ring Z/970200Z = Z/8 × Z/9 × Z/25 × Z/49 × Z/11 —
from which physical constants, biological scaling laws, error correction codes, and
cryptographic protocols can be derived with zero free parameters. Every claim is
computed live in the browser. No backend, no API, no frameworks. Pure arithmetic.

## Start here
- /story.html: Full narrative — ten terms, 108 rings, one heartbeat
- /derive_ax.html: Derive everything from 0/0 in 10 steps
- /worldview.html: 29 paradigm shifts, each verifiable
- /repl.html: Live REPL — compute everything yourself

## Physics (all verified to measured values)
- /alpha.html: Fine structure constant — 7-term formula, sub-ppb accuracy
- /sm.html: All 25 Standard Model parameters, mean error 0.42%
- /particles.html: Particle masses from eigenvalue spectrum
- /constants.html: Gravitational, Boltzmann, Planck — all derived
- /cosmo.html: CMB temperature, dark energy fraction
- /turbulence.html: Kolmogorov -5/3 = -E/K (exact), Kleiber 3/4 = K/D² (exact)
- /quantum.html: 42 quantum quantities from ring structure
- /gr.html: General relativity from CRT geometry
- /nuclear.html: Nuclear binding energy, QCD coupling

## Biology
- /biology.html: Biological scaling from five primes
- /dna.html: Genetic code structure in the ring
- /sleep.html: Sleep stages as CRT channel locking
- /heart.html: Cardiac rhythm from D²=4 pacemaker
- /chemistry.html: Periodic table structure

## Mathematics
- /lattice.html: 108-ring lattice, lambda=420 invariant
- /partitions.html: Partition function and the gate at 13
- /modular_forms.html: Modular forms from ring structure
- /monster_moonshine.html: Monster group connections
- /goldbach.html: Goldbach via CRT decomposition
- /rose.html: The Septilix — seven layers of structure

## Interactive demos
- /repl.html: .ax language REPL (3 modes: JS/WASM/Native)
- /ecc_live.html: Error correction — corrupt bits and watch them heal
- /emergence.html: Artificial life from 3 boolean operations
- /sandpile.html: Self-organized criticality simulation
- /music.html: Hear the axiom — five harmonics
- /lava_lamp.html: CRT-driven visual demo
- /ax_games.html: Games built with .ax language

## Engineering
- /ouroboros_compiler.html: Self-compiling .ax compiler
- /mesh_demo.html: Mesh networking protocol
- /fountain_codes.html: Fountain codes from CRT
- /crt_hash_demo.html: CRT-based hashing

## Key claims (all computable in /repl.html)
- Ring: 970200 = 2³ × 3² × 5² × 7² × 11
- Five primes: D=2, K=3, E=5, b=7, L=11
- Lambda: 420 = LCM(1..7), shared by 108 rings
- Phi: 201600 = phi(970200) units
- OMEGA: 606376 = 2^420 mod 970200, idempotent projector
- Kolmogorov exponent: -5/3 = -E/K (exact)
- Kleiber exponent: 3/4 = K/D² (exact)
- Fine structure: 7-term formula from ring eigenvalues
- All 25 SM parameters: mean error 0.42%
- Self-compiling .ax language: .ax → WASM → browser

## Technical
- Pure semantic HTML, no frameworks, no build step
- Sub-4KB per page typical, all inline JS
- .ax language: ring arithmetic + CRT + arrays + strings
- WASM compilation: .ax → C → WASM in browser
- CC0 public domain — no copyright, no restrictions
